title: Settings
subtitle: Connect WhatsApp, manage your team, and configure your workspace.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Connection
whatsapp.scanQR: Scan this QR code with your WhatsApp
whatsapp.noQR: Click Connect to generate a QR code.

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect WhatsApp
disconnectConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to disconnect your WhatsApp account?

warmup.label: Enable warm-up protection
warmup.description: Gradually ramp up daily message limits to protect a new number from being banned. Turn this OFF for established numbers that have been active for months.

team.title: Team Members
team.description: Manage team access to this workspace

removeConfirm.title: Remove Member
removeConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the team?

savedReplies.title: Saved Replies
savedReplies.description: Use shortcuts like /thanks in the message box
savedReplies.messagePlaceholder: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Reply
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this saved reply?

signOutConfirm.title: Sign Out
signOutConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to sign out?

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Update your password to keep your account secure
password.securityNotice: For security reasons, you will need to log in again after changing your password.

errorMessages.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
errorMessages.passwordSame: New password must be different from current password

language.title: Language & Region
language.description: Choose your preferred language. The interface will update immediately.
language.restartNotice: Language changes apply instantly without reloading.

customFields.title: Contact fields
customFields.subtitle: Define the information your business tracks. Custom fields appear on contact profiles, in the import mapper, in filters, and as personalization tokens in broadcasts.
customFields.emptyBody: Add the fields your business actually uses — city, plan, renewal date, credit limit.
